title: Introduction to Python Programming
content: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its readability. It is widely used in web development, data science, and artificial intelligence.

title: How Offline Search Engines Work
content: Offline search engines work by creating an inverted index of documents locally. This allows users to query text using algorithms like TF-IDF without an internet connection.

title: The Beauty of Flask Web Framework
content: Flask is a micro web framework written in Python. It is classified as a microframework because it does not require particular tools or libraries, making it highly customizable.
